new_classes.label_en: other fruit spirit (distilled from fruit other than plums, pears or cherries) in containers > 2 L (CN 2208 90 48)
new_classes.label_de: anderer Obstbranntwein (aus anderen Früchten als Pflaumen, Birnen oder Kirschen) in Behältnissen > 2 L (KN 2208 90 48)
new_classes.definition_en: Spirituous beverage obtained exclusively by alcoholic fermentation and distillation of fruit other than plums, pears or cherries (e.g. apricots, bilberries, raspberries, blackberries, black/white/red currants, strawberries, apples), presented in containers of more than 2 litres, classified under CN subheading 2208 90 48.

new_classes.label_en: other fruit feedstock (fermentation/distillation feedstock, excluding plums, pears and cherries)
new_classes.label_de: anderes Obstausgangsmaterial (Gärungs-/Destillationsausgangsstoff, ausgenommen Pflaumen, Birnen und Kirschen)
new_classes.definition_en: Fruit material (e.g. apricots, bilberries, raspberries, blackberries, currants, strawberries, apples) used as the exclusive feedstock for alcoholic fermentation and distillation to produce other fruit spirits under CN 2208 90 48; explicitly excludes plums, pears and cherries.

new_classes.label_en: other fruit alcoholic fermentation and distillation process
new_classes.label_de: alkoholische Gärung und Destillation von anderen Früchten
new_classes.definition_en: Combined process of alcoholic fermentation followed by distillation applied exclusively to fruit other than plums, pears or cherries, yielding an other fruit spirit classifiable under CN 2208 90 48.

coverage_explanation: The proposed axioms cover the three main distinguishing criteria from the legal text: (1) the beverage is a spirituous beverage obtained exclusively by alcoholic fermentation and distillation of fruit, (2) the fruit feedstock excludes plums, pears and cherries (disjointness with PlumsOrCherriesOrPearsFermentedMash), and (3) the container size is > 2 L (LargeContainer). The exemplary fruit types (apricots, bilberries, raspberries, blackberries, currants, strawberries, apples) are captured in the definition text but cannot be individually expressed as OWL class restrictions without introducing a large number of specific fruit-feedstock subclasses, which would over-proliferate. The 'exclusively' qualifier on the production process is captured via the functional distillation-process restriction. Minor gap: the explicit enumeration of excluded fruits (only plums, pears, cherries excluded) is expressed as a complement against the sibling class rather than a full enumeration of permitted fruits, which is a slight under-commitment (−0.15).
